titleStmt.title: SII 39.16: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 16. (A.R. No. 16 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA13+12TH = 25TH YEAR [13TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: Records the gift of land for making offerings to the goddess Tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai-Nāchchiyār set up by the chief Māḷavachakravartin mentioned in No. 13. He also gifted all the taxes like Kaḍamai, Antrāyam, Silvari, Peruvari Veṭṭi-muṭṭavāl etc., for the supply of sacred food offering to the deity in the temple of Tiruchchaṉṉavaṉamuḍaiyār at Ilaikkaḍambaṅkuḷam alias Hiraṉyavamaṅgalam a hamlet of pillar alias Sundarapāṇḍyanallūr in Tiruttiyūr muttam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉaccakravat
tikaḷ śrī kulacekara devaṟku yā
ṇṭu 10 3- vatin Etir 10 2vatu meṣanā
yaṟṟu 10 1- n=tiyati nāḷ tiruttiyūr muṭṭa
ttu piḻārāṉa cun=tarapāṇṭiya nallūrk kīḻ
piṭākai Ilaik kaṭampaṅkuḷamāṉa hiraṇyavā
mhamaṅkalattu tiruccanṉavaḷamuṭaiya nā
yaṉāya nāṟku mummuṭi coḻan māḷavarmā
ṇikkamāṉa māḷavacakravattiyen Inā
yaṉāṟku vāḻvu Eḻunteruḷivitta tiruppaḷḷi
yaṟai nācciyāṟkku tiruamutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa
vyañanaṅkaḷukku nām nir vārttu kuṭutta pari
cāvatu nakaraceṉāpati nam pakkal vilaiko
ṇṭa pañcan kuṭikkāṭāṉa civiṉi n=takāla na
llūr vaḷaiyiṟ cuṟṟu muṟṟilum nampātiyi
l Uḷḷa Aḷavu nel Uḷpaṭa kaṭamai Antarā
yamum cilvari peruvariyum veṭṭi muṭṭa
vāḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavu
m candradityavaṟ celvatāka nirvāt
tu kuṭutten māḷavac cakravattiye
n tiruccanṉavaṉamuṭaiya ṉāyaṉāṟ
ku Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 39.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
